title: Chen Tao
content:
Sun Tao
 is a member of the Purple Division of the 
Heavenly Fate Sect
 on 
Planet Tian Yun
.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Background

3

History

4

Links and References

Appearance
[
]

He looks like a skinny middle-aged man and gives off the feeling of being a respectable gentleman.

Background
[
]

He was the True-Disciple of Purple Division until 
Sun Yun
 suddenly came, defeated him, and took his title of True-Disciple of Purple Division. After the fight, he left Planet Tian Yun and didn't return for almost a millennium.

History
[
]

He reappeared 100 years after Sun Yun disappeared during the battle for the title of the True-Disciple of Purple Division. He barely managed to defeat Wang Lin even with his 
Ascendant
 cultivation and regained his title of the True-Disciple of Purple Division.

He, once again, met Wang Lin inside the capital of 
Sky Demon Country
 in the 
East Demon Spirit Sea
. At this time, however, his cultivation had dropped from the Mid-stage Ascendant to the peak of Late-stage 
Soul Transformation
 due to an ambush by the Da Lou Sword Sect. He became Shi Xiao's helper for the Demon General Competition.

Before Wang Lin went to the Allheaven Star System, when Wang Lin kill Shi Xiao, he warn him to be careful of 
All-Seer
.

Links and References
[
]

members of Da Lou Sword Sect.
